description: In collaboration with Welcome Week, join the Rutgers Democracy Lab for a free Movie Night Under the Stars. Bring your own towel or sit on a Rutgers picnic blanket to enjoy some fresh popcorn while watching Knives Out on the big screen.
name: Welcome Week "Knives Out" Movie Under the Stars
organizationName: The Rutgers Democracy Lab at the Eagleton Institute of Politics

description: Want to de-stress and craft? Come make a mood board with us for our next meeting and enjoy hot chocolate and desserts! RSVP: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfqxX2ihLc3-z0Yv4-90y75wCWXcIcqV9jjFB48ClVjF4GTLA/viewform
name: Cocoa and Collage

description: The Asian American Cultural Center will be hosting its annual Welcome Back Social on September 4th, 2026 from 4PM - 7 PM.  Please join us at our center where we will be having many activities for new and current students to engage in such as a pie eating contest, taking pictures at the photo booth, inflatable games, and lots of fun food, drinks, and ice cream.  This is also a great way to make new friends for the upcoming semester, and get to know some interest orgs that will be attending the event as well.  We cannot wait to see you there!  Did we mention there is free food and prizes?...
name: Welcome Back Social

description: Join The Rutgers Democracy Lab for their first-ever Welcome Bash. Get a bite to eat at a food truck, check if you are registered to vote with our RU Voting Team, play some games and win a prize, learn about what the programs at RDL are up to this semester, or take a ride on the bumper cars. Students can also add to the chain of pledges to vote, get an ice cream sundae, write on our democracy wall, take pictures at our photo booth, or try their hand at human shuffleboard. Come with friends or be ready to make new ones to see what other surprises RDL has in store. All students are welcome to this free event.
name: Welcome Week RDL Welcome Bash
organizationName: The Rutgers Democracy Lab at the Eagleton Institute of Politics

description: We aim to bring an inclusive and supportive community for people with interest in learning how to solve Rubik’s cubes and enhancing their skills with various other types of puzzles to learn what it is like to become competitive. We also plan to organize competitions at the school.
name: First Rubik's Cube Club Meeting
